---
title: "Job Search"
subtitle: "Where I have applied and where things stand"
date: today
toc: false
---

A public log of my job applications and where each one stands. I keep it here so
collaborators, references, and recruiters can see what I am pursuing.

**Status key:** Applied · Screening · Interview · Offer · Closed

| Applied | Role | Organization | Location | Status |
|---------|------|--------------|----------|--------|
| 2026-07-11 | Natural Resources Management Specialist III | Dept. of Hawaiian Home Lands | Hilo, HI | Applied |
| 2026-07-10 | GIS Analyst III | County of Hawai'i, Environmental Management | Hilo, HI | Applied |
| 2026-07-10 | Environmental Health Specialist II | State of Hawai'i, Dept. of Agriculture | Hilo, HI | Screening |
| 2026-07-06 | Data Analyst III | City of Boise | Boise, ID | Applied |
| 2026-06-28 | Geospatial Fisheries Analyst | Lynker (NOAA NWFSC) | Seattle, WA | Applied |
| 2026-06-28 | Fisheries Analyst | Lynker (NOAA NWFSC) | Seattle, WA | Applied |
| 2026-06-20 | Assistant Scientist / Planner | BKF Engineers | San Luis Obispo, CA | Applied |
| 2026-06-20 | Environmental Analyst / Associate Scientist | San Francisco Estuary Institute | Richmond, CA | Applied |
| 2026-06-20 | GIS Analyst | FLO Analytics | Seattle, WA / Portland, OR | Applied |

<!--
HOW TO MAINTAIN (Kyle):
- One row per application. Keep the newest at the top.
- Post only what you are comfortable being fully public. This page is separate
  from your private career CRM by design. Do NOT paste the CRM in wholesale;
  copy only the entries you want public, and strip any private notes/contacts.
- Suggested statuses: Applied, Screening, Interview, Offer, Closed.
  "Closed" reads better publicly than "Denied" or "Rejected."
- Want colored status pills instead of plain text? Ask and I will add them.

NOTES:
- Boise Data Analyst III: your posting file was marked sent but its pre-send
  checklist was unchecked. Published per your call. Double-check it actually went out.
- GIS Analyst III listed as "Applied" (MQ appeal passed). Bump to "Screening" if
  the county has since moved it forward to the hiring department.
-->
